name: Aarav Deshmukh
bio: Leads the club's strategic direction and represents Trendsetters at the district level.

name: Ayush Tiwari
bio: Steered club documentation, reporting, and event coordination through the 2025-26 Rotaract year.

name: Sanaya Kulkarni
bio: Keeps the club's records, minutes, and member communication running smoothly.

name: Rohan Patil
bio: Manages the club's finances, sponsorships, and budget planning for every event.

name: Mihika Joshi
bio: Supports the President and oversees committee coordination across avenues.

name: Kabir Shah
bio: Plans and executes the club's grassroots service projects across Magarpatta and Hadapsar.

name: Ishita Rao
bio: Curates skill-building workshops, industrial visits, and networking sessions for members.

name: Vihaan Mehta
bio: Builds bridges with Rotaract clubs abroad and runs the club's global awareness drives.

name: Anaya Bhatt
bio: Designs the member experience — fellowship events, onboarding, and team bonding.

name: Yash Kapoor
bio: Tells the club's story online and edits the quarterly newsletter.
